Landing.heroTitle: The work marketplace for migrants & honest employers.
Landing.heroPlaceholderJobs: Search by role, skill, or suburb — e.g. kitchen hand Melbourne
Landing.heroPlaceholderTalent: Describe the role or skills you need
Landing.heroImmersiveLead: Connecting businesses that need reliable casual teams with workers who deserve funded shifts and proof-based pay.
Landing.heroImageAlt: Professional working at a computer in a modern office
Landing.highlightsSubtitle: Workers and employers get different tools — and PRO on both sides, with benefits matched to each role.
Landing.highlightsW1Desc: Gear, tickets, travel — spend rules per job, yours or the employer’s.
Landing.highlightsW2Desc: One login; barista, cleaner, warehouse — apply with the card that fits the shift.
Landing.highlightsW3Desc: More visibility on funded shifts and faster payout options when we enable them.
Landing.highlightsE1Desc: Escrow or milestones per shift — pay out when hours and proof match what was funded.
Landing.highlightsE2Desc: Shortlist with tickets and visa context; approve geofenced check-ins — not screenshot ping-pong.
Landing.highlightsE3Desc: Boost funded posts, repeat crews, and structured disputes — not just a job ad.
Landing.trendingSubtitle: Tap a category to browse casual, contract, and funded roles across Australia.
Landing.pricingSectionSubtitle: الرسوم على العمل الممول الذي يُسوّى عبر TrustWork — وليس على مجرد الإعلانات.

Landing.pricingPlanStarterF2: تمويل الورديات أو المراحل قبل تسجيل الحضور؛ صرف الأجر عند تطابق إثبات السياج الجغرافي
Landing.pricingPlanStarterF3: قواعد إنفاق بطاقة TrustWork وتسوية بنكية أولاً في أستراليا

Landing.pricingPlanPlusF2: نزاعات منظمة وسجل تدقيق أقوى عبر المواقع والورديات
Landing.pricingPlanPlusF3: دعم أولوية وضوابط متقدمة لبطاقة TrustWork حسب الدور أو الموقع

Landing.tWorker2Quote: I run two profiles — weekday cleaning and weekend retail — one login.

Landing.footerRights: © {year} TrustWork Australia · Built for fair work Down Under
Landing.stackTitle: Fund it. Prove it. Pay it.
Landing.stackSubtitle: TrustWork sits between job boards and payroll: employers reserve money per shift or milestone before work starts; workers apply with the profile card that carries the right skills, tickets, and rates; geofenced attendance proves what happened on site; payout unlocks when funded amounts, approved hours, and proof line up — fiat-first, with TrustWork Card spend rules when you use them.
Landing.stackVideoCaption: How TrustWork works — quick overview (about 30 seconds).
Landing.stackVideoAriaLabel: Video: TrustWork trust loop — fund shifts, verify attendance, release pay.
Landing.stackVideoFallback: Your browser cannot play this video. Use the four steps below or update your browser.
Landing.stack1Desc: Stage escrow or milestones for that gig inside TrustWork before anyone clocks in — funded listings show commitment, not ‘pay me later’ casual risk.
Landing.stack2Desc: One login, several role cards — barista, cleaner, warehouse, care… Each card carries rates, RSA / White Card flags, and visa context so employers review the application that actually matches the shift.
Landing.stack3Desc: Workers check in and out inside the workplace boundary agreed for the job — timestamps become shared evidence for fast approvals or structured disputes, instead of chasing screenshots.
Landing.stack4Desc: When funded balances, approved hours, and GPS-backed proof match the agreement, settlement follows your rules — Australian bank rails first; faster paths optional. Card spend for gear or travel stays inside employer-set or self-pay limits tied to the role.
Landing.statsFootnote: Sources: ABS (casual employees & independent contractors); Fair Work Ombudsman published wage-recovery totals (multi-year). Numbers are illustrative public statistics — replace with your own citations for investor decks.
Landing.communityTeaserTitle: Visas, shifts, and peer advice — in one place
Landing.communityTeaserDesc: Discussion groups for hospitality, construction, regional work, and rights — rolling out on TrustWork so migrants aren’t alone in the inbox.

Community.title: TrustWork Community
Community.subtitle: Share experiences, ask questions, and learn from others navigating work and life in Australia — built for migrants, casual teams, and honest employers.
Community.referenceNote: TrustWork threads and groups will launch here with our escrow-first trust model; SEEK's forum is an independent reference for Australian jobseekers.
